studyName: The Genomic Landscape of Juvenile Myelomonocytic Leukemia

tables.description: This subject phenotype table contains subject ID, gender, age, primary disease, laboratory measurements (n= 7 variables; white blood count, absolute monocyte count, platelet count, fetal hemoglobin levels, missing a copy of chromosome 7 or not,  abnomal enlargement of the spleen or not,  and abnomal enlargement of the liver or not), patient treatment, outcome of the treatment, and status of patient at the time of study.

variables.name: Absolute_Monocyte_Count
variables.description: Blood absolute monocyte count

variables.name: Age_months
variables.description: Age of patient in number of months

variables.name: Fetal_hemoglobin
variables.description: Fetal hemoglobin levels

variables.name: Gender
variables.description: Participant's gender as Male or Female

variables.name: Hepatomegaly
variables.description: Did the patient prensent with an abnomal enlargement of the liver?

variables.name: Monosomy_7
variables.description: Is the patient missing a copy of chromosome 7?

variables.name: Outcome
variables.description: The patient outcome as it relates to the treatment

variables.name: Platelets
variables.description: Blood platelet count

variables.name: Primary Disease
variables.description: Primary disease of patient

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Unique Participant Identifier

variables.name: Splenomegaly
variables.description: Did the patient prensent with an abnomal enlargement of the spleen?

variables.name: Status
variables.description: Status of patient at the time of study

variables.name: Treatment
variables.description: The patient treatment

variables.name: White_Blood_Count
variables.description: White blood count

tables.description: This sample attributes table contains sample ID, sample type, sample origin, analyte type, and tissue type.

variables.name: ANALYTE_Type
variables.description: Molecular analyte

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

variables.name: Sample Origin
variables.description: Differentiates tumor and normal sample origin from patient

variables.name: Sample Type
variables.description: Indicates the Tumor / Normal status of a sample

variables.name: Tissue_Type
variables.description: The tissue type of the sample

tables.description: This data table contains a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs. The data table also includes sample use.

variables.name: SAMPID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample use type. Seq_DNA_SNP_MAF_Ind: Sample(s) were used to generate aggregate mutation annotation file (.maf) with individual SNP genotypes; Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID

tables.description: The subject consent file includes subject IDs and consent information.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SUBJID
variables.description: Subject ID
